results.summary: All 14 extensions present in EXTENSION_MIME_MAP and tested
parseImetaTags uses props.m || inferMimeFromUrl(url) — explicit m takes priority
parseNip92UrlTags calls inferMimeFromUrl for MIME inference
isBlobUrl requires HTTPS and /blob/ in pathname, tests cover positive and negative cases
MediaAttachments falls back to isBlobUrl when mimeType undefined
All 127 test suites pass, 2868/2869 tests pass (1 skipped)
inferMimeFromUrl is synchronous, uses only URL constructor and string operations
Existing parseMediaJson and parseImetaTags tests pass unchanged for explicit m fields

e2e_tests.reason: Story 02 E2E scenarios require mock blossom server infrastructure (FIXTURE-02-001) and event injection - covered by regression verification in Story 06
